## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `master` (not committing to `master` directly)
- [ ] `npm test` green (pre-existing failures called out)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` introduces no new errors
- [ ] Added tests — both "triggers" and "does-not-trigger" (bug fixes include a reproducing test)
- [ ] Respected the non-negotiable invariants (tool pairing, cacheable-prefix stability, `resolveToolPath`, `ToolErrorEnvelope`) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) / `standards.md`
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): summary` and explain **why**
